description_long: This rifle features a modern tactical design with a long, ventilated handguard and a flat-top upper receiver, likely for mounting optics or accessories. The body is primarily olive drab with black accents, including the pistol grip, magazine, and adjustable stock. The barrel is extended and appears to have a muzzle device at the tip, possibly a flash hider or compensator. The magazine is a detachable box type, and the rifle includes a prominent trigger guard and ergonomic grip. The stock is collapsible, allowing for adjustable length of pull. The overall construction suggests a blend of metal and polymer materials, typical of contemporary urban rifles.
description: A modern olive drab tactical rifle with a long ventilated handguard, collapsible stock, and detachable box magazine. Black accents highlight the grip, magazine, and stock.
description_view_0: Front view showing the narrow barrel, muzzle device, and the alignment of the handguard.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the full length of the rifle, collapsible stock, pistol grip, and detachable magazine.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the stock and the back of the receiver, with the handguard and barrel extending away.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the magazine, grip, and stock, with details of the handguard and muzzle device.
